run_summary.summary:
Liz is on her pitch game today! 💼 She sent TWO outbound collaboration pitches this morning for the same backyard firepit/patio makeover project — one to Shabebe (Rock Glue + hardscape) and one to Black Diamond Coatings (Mulch Glue). Smart parallel outreach. Both are now in the pipeline at negotiation stage, waiting on the brands to respond. I've created cards for both so we don't lose track.

Whisker + JLab were covered in the previous run (both updates should still be in the queue). No new inbound brand emails today.

suggestions.message: Liz pitched Lauren at Shabebe (wenna@shabebellc.com) this morning for a backyard firepit patio collab. If no response by Thursday Apr 30, worth a nudge — she sent a similar pitch to Black Diamond Coatings too, so she's clearly ready to move on this project.

Liz pitched Lauren Jankauskas at Black Diamond Coatings (lauren.jankauskas@blackdiamondcoatings.com) for the same backyard firepit patio project featuring their Mulch Glue. Follow up Apr 30 if no reply. Whichever brand responds first likely gets the feature!

deals.next_action: Wait for Lauren's response on backyard firepit collab proposal
deals.notes: [Apr 27]: Liz sent outbound pitch for backyard firepit/patio makeover collab. Offering to feature Shabebe's Rock Glue and hardscape products in a DIY raised patio project (large pavers + pea gravel + fire pit area + Adirondack chairs). Attached media kit. Kenny cc'd.
deals.activity_note: Apr 27: Liz sent outbound pitch to Shabebe (Lauren, wenna@shabebellc.com) — backyard firepit patio collab featuring Rock Glue. Waiting on response.

deals.next_action: Wait for Lauren's response on backyard firepit collab proposal
deals.notes: [Apr 27]: Liz sent outbound pitch for backyard firepit/patio makeover collab. Offering to feature Black Diamond Coatings' Mulch Glue and hardscape products in a DIY raised patio project (large pavers + pea gravel + fire pit area + Adirondack chairs). Attached media kit. Kenny cc'd.
deals.activity_note: Apr 27: Liz sent outbound pitch to Black Diamond Coatings (Lauren Jankauskas, lauren.jankauskas@blackdiamondcoatings.com) — backyard firepit patio collab featuring Mulch Glue. Waiting on response.
